title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback
why: The InstructGPT paper — foundational RLHF recipe behind ChatGPT and modern aligned LLMs.

title: Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model
why: DPO eliminated the separate RM training step — cleaner, faster preference alignment.

title: DeepSeekMath: Pushing the Limits of Mathematical Reasoning in Open Language Models
why: Introduced GRPO — group relative policy optimization that powers reasoning-focused post-training.

title: Attention Is All You Need
why: The transformer paper. Everything modern AI is built on this architecture.

title: In-context Learning and Induction Heads
why: Mechanistic interpretability at its best — discovering algorithmic circuits inside transformers.

title: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
why: The paper that launched the diffusion model revolution — DDPM made generative AI visual.

title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback
why: CAI showed how to scale safety training using AI self-critique — foundational to modern safety.

title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models
why: Showed that step-by-step prompting dramatically unlocks reasoning in LLMs — simple yet profound.
